step.name: init
step.action: Run pnpm create fastify; pin TS + Node.

step.name: wire-schemas
step.action: For each route, define TypeBox schemas for body / params / response.
step.decision-gate: Reject any route with no schema.

step.name: wire-routes
step.action: Register routes with schema option; handler signatures derive types from schemas.

step.name: wire-error-and-close
step.action: Add setErrorHandler + SIGINT/SIGTERM hooks calling fastify.close().
